articles.description: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta wants his side to channel the pain of back-to-back defeats when they take on Sporting in the Champions League quarter-finals.
articles.title: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta calls for perspective before crucial Sporting Champions League tie

articles.description: Sir Craig Reedie, the former chair of the British Olympic Association and president of the World Anti-Doping Agency, dies at the age of 84.
articles.title: Sir Craig Reedie: Former BOA and Wada executive dies aged 84

articles.description: Khadija Shaw scores as Manchester City beat Birmingham City to reach the semi-finals of the Women's FA Cup.
articles.title: Birmingham City 0-1 Manchester City: Khadija Shaw strike settles tie

articles.description: As Coventry edge ever closer to ending their 25-year wait for Premier League football, who is best placed to join them?
articles.title: Coventry City edge towards Premier League promotion - who will join them?

articles.description: Bayern Munich are waiting on the fitness of "very special" Harry Kane to see if he can lead their challenge to overcome Real Madrid in the Champions League quarter-final.
articles.title: Champions League: Bayern Munich waiting on fitness of 'very special' Harry Kane

articles.description: John Pakey looks back over the past 20 years from Keith Alexander to the Cowleys to Lincoln City now calling themselves a Championship club.
articles.title: Lincoln City: The story behind the Imps' quiet and steady rise from non-league to the Championship

articles.description: Britain's Katie Boulter suffers a first-round defeat to Romania's Elena-Gabriela Ruse at the Upper Austria Ladies Linz Open.
articles.title: Katie Boulter suffers first-round exit to Elena-Gabriela Ruse in Austria

articles.description: Veerle Buurman scores a late winner as holders Chelsea beat Tottenham to reach the Women's FA Cup semi-finals.
articles.title: Chelsea 2-1 Tottenham: Veerle Buurman sends Blues into Women's FA Cup semis

articles.description: Delicious Orie discusses his shock decision to retire from boxing and why he wants to be a role model for the younger generation.
articles.title: Boxing: Delicious Orie says depression fear drove his retirement

articles.description: Bristol City's interim manager Roy Hodgson makes it successive victories at the helm.
articles.title: Bristol City 1-0 Sheffield United: Interim boss Roy Hodgson wins again
